mapper.select: SELECT c.course_name, c.course_code AS course_id, MIN(cs.section_no) || '분반' AS division, TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END || '학기' AS semester FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 GROUP BY c.course_name, c.course_code, sm.year, sm.term

SELECT ua.login_id AS student_id, s.name, s.year_level AS grade, d.dept_name AS major, e.status, TO_CHAR(e.enrolled_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS enrolled_at, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(e.professor_note, 4000, 1) AS note FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.user_id = s.user_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(ua.login_id) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR LOWER(s.name) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) AND (#{grade} IS NULL OR s.year_level = #{grade}) AND ( #{major} IS NULL OR LOWER(d.dept_name) LIKE '%' || #{major} || '%' OR LOWER(d.dept_code) LIKE '%' || #{major} || '%' ) ORDER BY ua.login_id
